$description: Captured 1:1 from components/ui/pagination/pagination.tsx. Page links are Buttons (variant outline when active, ghost otherwise) — their height/padding/radius come from button.*; only the list, the prev/next nudge and the ellipsis are pagination's own.

prevNextInlinePadding.$description: Previous/Next tighten the icon-side padding (pl-1.5! / pr-1.5!) against the button default.
